creator: pmurray@nevada.net.nz
text:
Hi Robert,

Thank you for committing this fix, really appreciate it. Seems to solve most of my Nginx+Passenger problems. 

I am curious however, if this PR/Patch has any effect on this old PR?

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=79138

It may not be, but it does seem to be a case of ENOTCONN leaking back to userspace programs.=
